title: 毎日王冠の後に・我等、此処に集いて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan feels the full force of the power
coursing through Oguri Cap and the other racers.
She promises Oguri Cap that, no matter what,
they will race again at the autumn Tenno Sho,
and she will claim victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Yaeno Muteki arranges to meet
with Mejiro Ardan and Sakura Chiyono O, then
hands each of them a letter of challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The letters contain a proposal to settle their score at the autumn Tenno Sho—a race that Oguri Cap will also be entering—and to show the world that they are the true top three.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's heart soars when she hears Yaeno
Muteki's suggestion. The three rivals, illuminated
by the setting sun, vow to battle for supremacy at
the autumn Tenno Sho.
